allow: Bash(matlab -batch "try; addpath\(pwd\); drl_test_reward; catch ME; disp\(ME.message\); exit\(1\); end")

Bash(matlab -batch "fprintf\('cwd: %s\\n', pwd\); fprintf\('exists drl_reward_function: %d\\n', exist\('drl_reward_function', 'file'\)\); fprintf\('exists drl_test_reward: %d\\n', exist\('drl_test_reward', 'file'\)\); rehash; fprintf\('r\(0\) = %.6f\\n', drl_piecewise_reward\(0\)\);")
Bash(matlab -batch "try; rehash; fprintf\('test 1: %.6f\\n', feval\('drl_piecewise_reward', 0\)\); catch ME; disp\(ME.message\); end")
Bash(matlab -batch "try; rehash; drl_test_reward; catch ME; disp\(ME.message\); exit\(1\); end")

Bash(matlab -batch "d = load\('drl_training_data.mat'\); fprintf\('obs: %dx%d\\n', size\(d.observations\)\); fprintf\('act: %dx%d\\n', size\(d.actions\)\); fprintf\('rew: %dx%d\\n', size\(d.rewards\)\); fprintf\('nxt: %dx%d\\n', size\(d.next_obs\)\); fprintf\('done: %dx%d\\n', size\(d.dones\)\); fprintf\('done sum: %d\\n', sum\(d.dones\)\); fprintf\('reward mean: %.6f\\n', mean\(d.rewards\)\); fprintf\('reward std: %.6f\\n', std\(d.rewards\)\);")
